name: Peanut Butter Creams
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the powdered sugar, sweetened condensed milk, and creamy peanut butter in a medium mixing bowl.
2. Stir until well blended.
3. Stir in the mini chocolate chips.
4. Chill until firm.
5. Shape into 1-inch balls.
6. Roll each ball in sprinkles or crystals.
7. Refrigerate until firm.
Yields: about 5 dozen.
